# New-hire onboarding checklist: Platform team

Week 1: provision laptop, VPN, and Okta SSO access. Assign onboarding buddy
(default: most recent platform hire). Schedule intro meetings with Marcus
Webb (platform lead) and Priya Nair (finance liaison for expense reports).

Week 2: complete the security training module and get read access to the
`engine/` and `agents/` repositories. Shadow one on-call rotation shift
(non-paging) with a senior engineer.

No relation to billing/refund topics; kept separate intentionally so
onboarding notes don't get miscategorized as billing content.
